testcase.name: test_batch_happy_path_two_artists
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter44_multi_artist_recap.py:192: in test_batch_happy_path_two_artists assert r.status_code in (200, 201), f"{r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: 400 {"detail":"event_id does not belong to you"} E assert 400 in (200, 201) E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_payments_batch_init_and_verify

failure.message: AssertionError: Depends on TestBookingBatch.happy path assert False + where False = hasattr(pytest, 'iter44_batch')

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter44_multi_artist_recap.py:237: in test_payments_batch_init_and_verify assert hasattr(pytest, "iter44_batch"), "Depends on TestBookingBatch.happy path" E AssertionError: Depends on TestBookingBatch.happy path E assert False E + where False = hasattr(pytest, 'iter44_batch')
